categories.label: Doors Found
categories.description: Number of oneiric Door cards acquired (0-8). All 8 required to win.

categories.label: Nightmares Faced
categories.description: Number of Nightmare cards encountered during the game (out of 10 total). Track for performance analysis.

categories.label: Keys Used for Doors
categories.description: Number of Key cards used to claim Doors when drawn. Track to measure Key efficiency.

categories.label: Sequences Completed
categories.description: Number of three-in-a-row color sequences completed to discover Doors.

categories.label: Prophecies Triggered
categories.description: Number of Prophecies triggered by discarding Key cards.

categories.label: Cards Remaining in Deck
categories.description: Cards left in the deck when the game ends. Higher is better (more margin of safety on a win).

categories.label: Game Result
categories.description: Win (all 8 Doors found) or Loss (deck exhausted). Enter 1 for win, 0 for loss.
